element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary combat tool for defeating enemies and breaking bricks
Defeated via mallet strikes or avoided by landing on top without damage
Bonus point collection, also serves as progression gate with Daffy Duck
Can be deflected with mallet or avoided
Unique boss patterns: Foghorn Leghorn, Sylvester, Tasmanian Devil require mallet combat; Daffy Duck must be avoided to reach progression carrot
Extra lives earning mechanic (up to 99 max)

typical_relief_triggers: Boss defeat transitions to next level
typical_tension_triggers: Boss character appearance at level end
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Standard platformer pacing with escalating boss difficulty; minigame breaks provide relief rhythm at regular intervals

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic mallet combat and simple enemy avoidance
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy projectile patterns and platforming complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters with Looney Tunes characters requiring specific attack patterns and Daffy Duck avoidance mechanics
notable_spikes: Transition from regular enemies to boss encounters
Daffy Duck boss (unique avoidance-only mechanic diverges from mallet-based combat pattern)

notable_level_patterns.description: Side-scrolling progression through platform obstacles, enemy encounters, and collectibles (hearts, carrots) leading to boss battle
Warner Bros. character bosses (Foghorn Leghorn, Sylvester, Tasmanian Devil) defeated via mallet combat with enemy-specific attack patterns
Unique avoidance-only boss where Daffy Duck cannot be damaged; progression requires reaching carrot pickup through evasion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Specific level with Daffy Duck boss

notable_level_patterns.description: End-of-level minigame providing extra life opportunity (cumulative maximum 99 lives)

sources_used: Wikipedia: The Bugs Bunny Birthday Blowout (gameplay and boss mechanics)
The Cutting Room Floor (unused content and regional variations)
